summary: Iteration 74: Backend security features tested - JWT token refresh, cookie-based auth, N+1 optimization, IDOR fix, brute-force protection. FIXED bug in verify-email endpoint that caused 520 errors due to shadowed imports.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: UnboundLocalError in /app/backend/routes/auth.py verify_email endpoint - removed local 'from datetime import ...' statements that shadowed module-level imports, causing 520 errors during brute-force lockout
JWT Token System: Access tokens (1hr) and refresh tokens (30 days) working correctly with type field validation
Cookie Auth: aa_access_token and aa_refresh_token cookies properly set with HttpOnly, Secure flags
Customer List: Uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline for efficient querying - no N+1
IDOR Fix: Customer activation endpoint uses get_tenant_filter() to properly scope to tenant
Brute-Force Protection: Verification locked after 5 failed attempts for 15 minutes

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 tests passed after rate limit cleared)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during brute-force testing with TEST_* prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features verified in iteration 74: 1) JWT refresh endpoint (/api/auth/refresh) returns new access tokens using refresh token from cookie. 2) Login endpoints set both aa_access_token (1hr, path=/) and aa_refresh_token (30 days, path=/api/auth) cookies. 3) Customers list uses MongoDB aggregation for efficient N+1-free querying. 4) IDOR protection on customer activation uses tenant filter. 5) Verification brute-force protection locks after 5 failed attempts. BUG FIX: verify_email had shadowed datetime imports causing 520 errors.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: UnboundLocalError in verify_email endpoint - 'from datetime import datetime' and 'from datetime import timedelta' statements at lines 841 and 856 shadowed module-level imports, causing 'cannot access local variable datetime' error during brute-force lockout
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Removed local imports - datetime, timezone, and timedelta are already imported at module level on line 10

mocked_apis_note: Zoho Mail/CRM API calls are MOCKED. Email sending is MOCKED unless provider is validated and activated.
